name: e2e-structured-output-json
description: Task-level JSON output validation stores parsed structured output and join context receives it.

tasks.task: Reply exactly {"summary":"E2E_STRUCTURED_OK","findings":[],"evidence":[],"nextActions":[]} and do not inspect or modify files.
Reply exactly STRUCTURED_CONTEXT_PEER_OK and do not inspect or modify files.

synthesize.task: If the Synthesize Context includes a line beginning structuredOutput: and includes E2E_STRUCTURED_OK, reply exactly E2E_STRUCTURED_CONTEXT_OK. Otherwise reply exactly E2E_STRUCTURED_CONTEXT_MISSING. Do not inspect or modify files.
